---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-30"
---

# Package loading

```{r}
rm(list = ls())

if (!require("pacman")){
  install.packages("pacman", repos = "http://cran.us.r-project.org")
}

p_load(
  "tidyverse", "here", "haven", "stringr", "dplyr", "labelled",
  "purrr", "readr", "gtsummary", "gt","survey", "boot","survival","TraMineR"
)
```


# Load the datasets

```{r}
source(here::here("0_paths_jl.R"))

dt_analysis_age70 <- readRDS(here(
  path_to_data,
  "dt_analysis_age70.rds"
))

dt_analysis_age70_3cat <- readRDS(here(
  path_to_data,
  "dt_analysis_age70_3cat.rds"
))


source(here::here("function_jl.R"))
#Split the data by each algorithm
#convert variable type to factor
#apply the factor function after stratifying by algorithm, because of the race_ethnicity variable
dt_analysis_age70_langa <-dt_analysis_age70_3cat%>%
  filter(algorithm=="lw")%>%
  recode_for_gtsum()

dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet <-dt_analysis_age70_3cat%>%
  filter(algorithm=="hudomiet")%>%
  recode_for_gtsum()

dt_analysis_age70_dp <-dt_analysis_age70%>%
  filter(algorithm=="expert")%>%
  recode_for_gtsum()

dt_analysis_age70_memimp <-dt_analysis_age70%>%
  filter(algorithm=="wu")%>%
  recode_for_gtsum()
```


```{r}
dt_analysis_age70_langa_dementia <- dt_analysis_age70_langa %>%
  filter(event_dementia == 1)

dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet_dementia <- dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet %>%
  filter(event_dementia == 1)

dt_analysis_age70_dp_dementia <- dt_analysis_age70_dp %>%
  filter(event_dementia == 1)

dt_analysis_age70_memimp_dementia <- dt_analysis_age70_memimp %>%
  filter(event_dementia == 1)
```



# seq plot
```{r}
dem_cols <- c(
  "dem2010", "dem2012", "dem2014",
  "dem2016", "dem2018", "dem2020"
)

dem_3lw_cols <- c(
  "dem_3lw2010", "dem_3lw2012", "dem_3lw2014",
  "dem_3lw2016", "dem_3lw2018", "dem_3lw2020"
)

dem_3hudomiet_cols <- c(
  "dem_3hudomiet2010", "dem_3hudomiet2012",
  "dem_3hudomiet2014", "dem_3hudomiet2016"
)

dt_analysis_age70_langa <- dt_analysis_age70_langa %>%
  select(
    hhidpn,
    algorithm,
    all_of(dem_3lw_cols),
    everything()
  )

dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet <- dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet %>%
  select(
    hhidpn,
    algorithm,
    all_of(dem_3hudomiet_cols),
    everything()
  )
```



```{r}
# event dementia n
dt_analysis_age70_langa %>%
  filter(event_dementia == 1)%>%
  nrow()

dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet %>%
  filter(event_dementia == 1)%>%
  nrow()

dt_analysis_age70_dp %>%
  filter(event_dementia == 1)%>%
  nrow()

dt_analysis_age70_memimp %>%
  filter(event_dementia == 1)%>%
  nrow()
```


```{r}
# Function to flag reverters based on a set of columns and reversion pattern
flag_reverters <- function(df, cols, from_val, to_val) {
  df %>%
    select(hhidpn, all_of(cols)) %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(has_revert = {
      vals <- c_across(all_of(cols))
      any(sapply(which(vals == from_val), function(i) any(vals[(i+1):length(vals)] == to_val, na.rm = TRUE)))
    }) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(has_revert) %>%
    pull(hhidpn)
}
```


```{r}
# ---- Langa-Weir: dementia subset + reverters ----
# Define reverters as anyone with dementia→normal, dementia→CIND, or CIND→normal
langa_reverter_ids <- unique(c(
  flag_reverters(dt_analysis_age70_langa_dementia, dem_3lw_cols, 3, 1), # dem -> normal
  flag_reverters(dt_analysis_age70_langa_dementia, dem_3lw_cols, 3, 2) # dem -> CIND
))

dt_langa_dem_revert <- dt_analysis_age70_langa_dementia %>%
  filter(hhidpn %in% langa_reverter_ids)

#304
```


```{r}
# Dementia -> Normal
ids_dem_to_normal <- flag_reverters(dt_analysis_age70_langa_dementia, dem_3lw_cols, 3, 1)
length(ids_dem_to_normal)

# Dementia -> CIND
ids_dem_to_cind <- flag_reverters(dt_analysis_age70_langa_dementia, dem_3lw_cols, 3, 2)
length(ids_dem_to_cind)

length(unique(c(ids_dem_to_normal, ids_dem_to_cind)))
```


```{r}
# Langa 3-cat seq plot (dementia + reverters)
cog_seq_langa <- dt_langa_dem_revert %>%
  select(hhidpn, all_of(dem_3lw_cols)) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("dem"), ~ case_when(
    . == 1 ~ "Normal",
    . == 2 ~ "CIND",
    . == 3 ~ "Dementia",
    TRUE   ~ "Missing"
  )))

seq_data_langa <- cog_seq_langa %>% select(-hhidpn)
colnames(seq_data_langa) <- c("2010", "2012", "2014", "2016", "2018", "2020")

seq_def_langa <- seqdef(seq_data_langa)

colors <- c(
  "Normal"   = "lightyellow",
  "CIND"     = "#FFD580",
  "Dementia" = "#FFA07A",
  "Missing"  = "gray"
)
seq_def_langa <- seqdef(seq_data_langa)

colors <- c(
  "Normal"   = "lightyellow",
  "CIND"     = "#FFD580",
  "Dementia" = "#FFA07A",
  "Missing"  = "gray"
)
state_order  <- attr(seq_def_langa, "alphabet")
cpal_ordered <- colors[state_order] 

png(file_path, width = 10, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)


layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 1), widths = c(4, 1))

par(cex.main = 1.1, cex.lab = 1, cex.axis = 1)
seqIplot(seq_def_langa,
         sortv = "from.start",
         with.legend = FALSE,
         ylab = "Individuals (N = 304)",
         xlab = "Year",
         las = 1,
         yaxt = "n",
         cpal = cpal_ordered)


par(mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0))
plot.new()
legend_order <- c("Normal", "CIND", "Dementia", "Missing")
legend("center",
       legend = legend_order,
       fill   = colors[legend_order],
       bty    = "o",         
       box.lwd = 1,           
       bg = "white")          

dev.off()
```


```{r}
# Langa 2-cat seq plot (dementia + reverters)
# For 2-cat, "reverter" only means dementia -> no dementia
langa_reverter_ids_2cat <- flag_reverters(
  dt_analysis_age70_langa_dementia, dem_cols, 1, 0
)
dt_langa_dem_revert_2cat <- dt_analysis_age70_langa_dementia %>%
  filter(hhidpn %in% langa_reverter_ids_2cat)

cog_seq_langa <- dt_langa_dem_revert_2cat %>%
  select(hhidpn, all_of(dem_cols)) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("dem"), ~ case_when(
    . == 0 ~ "No dementia",
    . == 1 ~ "Dementia",
    TRUE   ~ "Missing"
  )))
seq_data_langa <- cog_seq_langa %>% select(-hhidpn)
colnames(seq_data_langa) <- c("2010", "2012", "2014", "2016", "2018", "2020")

seq_def_langa <- seqdef(seq_data_langa) 

colors <- c(
  "No dementia" = "#F0E68C",
  "Dementia"    = "#FFA07A",
  "Missing"     = "gray"
)
state_order  <- attr(seq_def_langa, "alphabet")
cpal_ordered <- colors[state_order]       

file_path <- "D:/OneDrive - University of Southern California/R00/Manuscripts/HRS/Dementia algorithms/Output/seqIplot_langa_2cat.png"
png(file_path, width = 10, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)


layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 1), widths = c(4, 1))

par(cex.main = 1.1, cex.lab = 1, cex.axis = 1)
seqIplot(seq_def_langa,
         sortv = "from.start",
         with.legend = FALSE,
         ylab = "Individuals (N = 304)",
         xlab = "Year",
         las = 1,
         yaxt = "n",
         cpal = cpal_ordered)


par(mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0))
plot.new()
legend_order <- c("No dementia", "Dementia", "Missing")
legend("center",
       legend = legend_order,
       fill   = colors[legend_order],
       bty    = "o",
       box.lwd = 1,
       bg = "white")

dev.off()

```




```{r}
# ---- Expert: dementia subset + reverters (2-cat only) ----

expert_reverter_ids <- flag_reverters(
  dt_analysis_age70_dp_dementia, dem_cols, 1, 0
)
dt_dp_dem_revert <- dt_analysis_age70_dp_dementia %>%
  filter(hhidpn %in% expert_reverter_ids)

cog_seq_dp <- dt_dp_dem_revert %>%
  select(hhidpn, all_of(dem_cols)) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("dem"), ~ case_when(
    . == 0 ~ "No dementia",
    . == 1 ~ "Dementia",
    TRUE   ~ "Missing"
  )))
seq_data_dp <- cog_seq_dp %>% select(-hhidpn)
colnames(seq_data_dp) <- c("2010", "2012", "2014", "2016", "2018", "2020")

seq_def_dp <- seqdef(seq_data_dp)  

colors <- c(
  "No dementia" = "#F0E68C",
  "Dementia"    = "#FFA07A",
  "Missing"     = "gray"
)
state_order  <- attr(seq_def_dp, "alphabet")
cpal_ordered <- colors[state_order]     

file_path <- "D:/OneDrive - University of Southern California/R00/Manuscripts/HRS/Dementia algorithms/Output/seqIplot_dp.png"
png(file_path, width = 10, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)


layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 1), widths = c(4, 1))

par(cex.main = 1.1, cex.lab = 1, cex.axis = 1)
seqIplot(seq_def_dp,
         sortv = "from.start",
         with.legend = FALSE,
         ylab = "Individuals (N = 469)",
         xlab = "Year",
         las = 1,
         yaxt = "n",
         cpal = cpal_ordered)


par(mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0))
plot.new()
legend_order <- c("No dementia", "Dementia", "Missing")
legend("center",
       legend = legend_order,
       fill   = colors[legend_order],
       bty    = "o",
       box.lwd = 1,
       bg = "white")

dev.off()
```


```{r}
# ---- Hudomiet: dementia subset + reverters ----
hudomiet_cols <- c(
  "dem_3hudomiet2010", "dem_3hudomiet2012",
  "dem_3hudomiet2014", "dem_3hudomiet2016"
)
hudomiet_reverter_ids <- unique(c(
  flag_reverters(dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet_dementia, hudomiet_cols, 3, 1),
  flag_reverters(dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet_dementia, hudomiet_cols, 3, 2)
))
ids_hud_dem_to_normal <- flag_reverters(dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet_dementia, hudomiet_cols, 3, 1)
length(ids_hud_dem_to_normal)
ids_hud_dem_to_cind <- flag_reverters(dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet_dementia, hudomiet_cols, 3, 2)
length(ids_hud_dem_to_cind)
length(unique(c(ids_hud_dem_to_normal, ids_hud_dem_to_cind)))

dt_hudomiet_dem_revert <- dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet_dementia %>%
  filter(hhidpn %in% hudomiet_reverter_ids)

# 3-cat
cog_seq_hudomiet <- dt_hudomiet_dem_revert %>%
  select(hhidpn, all_of(hudomiet_cols)) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("dem"), ~ case_when(
    . == 1 ~ "Normal",
    . == 2 ~ "CIND",
    . == 3 ~ "Dementia",
    TRUE   ~ "Missing"
  )))
seq_data_hudomiet <- cog_seq_hudomiet %>% select(-hhidpn)
colnames(seq_data_hudomiet) <- c("2010", "2012", "2014", "2016")

colors <- c(
  "Normal"   = "lightyellow",
  "CIND"     = "#FFD580",
  "Dementia" = "#FFA07A",
  "Missing"  = "gray"
)


seq_def_hudomiet <- seqdef(seq_data_hudomiet[nrow(seq_data_hudomiet):1, ])
state_order  <- attr(seq_def_hudomiet, "alphabet")
cpal_ordered <- colors[state_order]     

file_path <- "D:/OneDrive - University of Southern California/R00/Manuscripts/HRS/Dementia algorithms/Output/seqIplot_hu_3cat.png"
png(file_path, width = 10, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)


layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 1), widths = c(4, 1))

par(cex.main = 1.1, cex.lab = 1, cex.axis = 1)
seqIplot(seq_def_hudomiet,
         sortv = NULL,
         with.legend = FALSE,
         ylab = "Individuals (N = 4)",
         xlab = "Year",
         las = 1,
         yaxt = "n",
         cpal = cpal_ordered)


par(mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0))
plot.new()
legend_order <- c("Normal", "CIND", "Dementia", "Missing")
legend("center",
       legend = legend_order,
       fill   = colors[legend_order],
       bty    = "o",
       box.lwd = 1,
       bg = "white")

dev.off()
```


```{r}
# Hudomiet 2-cat
hudomiet_reverter_ids_2cat <- flag_reverters(
  dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet_dementia, c("dem2010","dem2012","dem2014","dem2016"), 1, 0
)
dt_hudomiet_dem_revert_2cat <- dt_analysis_age70_hudomiet_dementia %>%
  filter(hhidpn %in% hudomiet_reverter_ids_2cat)

cog_seq_hudomiet <- dt_hudomiet_dem_revert_2cat %>%
  select(hhidpn, dem2010, dem2012, dem2014, dem2016) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("dem"), ~ case_when(
    . == 0 ~ "No dementia",
    . == 1 ~ "Dementia",
    TRUE   ~ "Missing"
  )))
seq_data_hudomiet <- cog_seq_hudomiet %>% select(-hhidpn)
colnames(seq_data_hudomiet) <- c("2010", "2012", "2014", "2016")

seq_def_hudomiet <- seqdef(seq_data_hudomiet)

colors <- c(
  "No dementia" = "#F0E68C",
  "Dementia"    = "#FFA07A",
  "Missing"     = "gray"
)
state_order  <- attr(seq_def_hudomiet, "alphabet")
cpal_ordered <- colors[state_order]       

file_path <- "D:/OneDrive - University of Southern California/R00/Manuscripts/HRS/Dementia algorithms/Output/seqIplot_hu_2cat.png"
png(file_path, width = 10, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)


layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 1), widths = c(4, 1))

par(cex.main = 1.1, cex.lab = 1, cex.axis = 1)
seqIplot(seq_def_hudomiet,
         sortv = "from.start",
         with.legend = FALSE,
         ylab = "Individuals (N = 4)",
         xlab = "Year",
         las = 1,
         yaxt = "n",
         cpal = cpal_ordered)


par(mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0))
plot.new()
legend_order <- c("No dementia", "Dementia", "Missing")
legend("center",
       legend = legend_order,
       fill   = colors[legend_order],
       bty    = "o",
       box.lwd = 1,
       bg = "white")

dev.off()
```


```{r}
# ---- Wu: dementia subset + reverters ----
memimp_reverter_ids <- flag_reverters(
  dt_analysis_age70_memimp_dementia, dem_cols, 1, 0
)
dt_memimp_dem_revert <- dt_analysis_age70_memimp_dementia %>%
  filter(hhidpn %in% memimp_reverter_ids)

cog_seq_memimp <- dt_memimp_dem_revert %>%
  select(hhidpn, all_of(dem_cols)) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("dem"), ~ case_when(
    . == 0 ~ "No dementia",
    . == 1 ~ "Dementia",
    TRUE   ~ "Missing"
  )))
seq_data_memimp <- cog_seq_memimp %>% select(-hhidpn)
colnames(seq_data_memimp) <- c("2010", "2012", "2014", "2016", "2018", "2020")

seq_def_memimp <- seqdef(seq_data_memimp)  

colors <- c(
  "No dementia" = "#F0E68C",
  "Dementia"    = "#FFA07A",
  "Missing"     = "gray"
)
state_order  <- attr(seq_def_memimp, "alphabet")
cpal_ordered <- colors[state_order]     

file_path <- "D:/OneDrive - University of Southern California/R00/Manuscripts/HRS/Dementia algorithms/Output/seqIplot_wu.png"
png(file_path, width = 10, height = 7, units = "in", res = 300)


layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 1), widths = c(4, 1))

par(cex.main = 1.1, cex.lab = 1, cex.axis = 1)
seqIplot(seq_def_memimp,
         sortv = "from.start",
         with.legend = FALSE,
         ylab = "Individuals (N = 171)",
         xlab = "Year",
         las = 1,
         yaxt = "n",
         cpal = cpal_ordered)


par(mar = c(0, 0, 0, 0))
plot.new()
legend_order <- c("No dementia", "Dementia", "Missing")
legend("center",
       legend = legend_order,
       fill   = colors[legend_order],
       bty    = "o",
       box.lwd = 1,
       bg = "white")

dev.off()
```
